LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT CANDYTOPIA LLC'S MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS. CANDYTOPIA, LLC'S "MOTION FOR JUDGMENT ON THE PLEADINGS AS TO THE THIRD CAUSE OF ACTION FOR NEGLIGENT INFLICTION OF EMOTIONAL DISTRESS" IS GRANTED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND. ORDER IS SIGNED. JUDGE: RICHARD B. ULMER JR., CLERK: M. GOODMAN, COURT REPORTER: MARIA TORREANO, CSR#8600, MARIA.TORREANO@GMAIL.COM, REPORTED. =(302/RBU)

MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR SEP-08-2020 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON JAN-04-2021 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 206. NICOMEDES HERRERA, ESQ. AND LAURA SEIDL, ESQ. APPEARING FOR PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF FOUAD DADAH IS PRESENT IN COURT. TRACY LEWIS, ESQ. AND ILON OLIVERIA, ESQ. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT. THE COURT CONTINUES THE TRIAL TO 1/4/21 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206. A VOLUNTARY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE IS ASSIGNED TO JUDGE MARY WISS. AFTER ARGUMENT, THE COURT ORDERS THAT THE ONLY DISCOVERY THAT WILL REMAIN OPEN 30 DAYS BEFORE 1/4/21 IS THE DEPOSITION OF THE PERSON MOST KNOWLEDGEABLE AND PRODUCTION OF DOCUMENTS ATTACHED TO THAT DEPOSITION. ANY AND ALL DISCOVERY STEMMING OUT OF THE MOTION TO COMPEL THAT IS IN DEPT. 302 AT THIS TIME AND NOTHING MORE UNLESS THE JUDGE IN DEPT. 302 DECIDES OTHERWISE. ALL DISCOVERY IS CLOSED 30 DAYS BEFORE THE TRIAL DATE OF 1/4/21. ALL PARTIES ARE ORDERED TO APPEAR ON 1/4/21 FOR TRIAL CALL. NOTICE WAIVED BY PARTIES. JUDGE: SAMUEL K. FENG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; COURT REPORTER: KIMBERLY RICHARDSON, CSR#5915, TEL. (818) 465-9222, EMAIL: CSRKIM@COMCAST.NET. (206)
